headline: Harris Teeter Offers VIC Card Members Daily Deals, 4x Fuel Points During Week-Long Customer Appreciation Sale May 13-19
summary: Harris Teeter is celebrating its shoppers with a week-long customer appreciation sale for VIC card members, featuring hundreds of limited-time savings on meat, groceries, beverages, health & beauty, and more.

raw.headline: Harris Teeter Offers VIC Card Members Daily Deals, 4x Fuel Points During Week-Long Customer Appreciation Sale May 13-19
raw.summary: Harris Teeter is celebrating its shoppers with a week-long customer appreciation sale for VIC card members, featuring hundreds of limited-time savings on meat, groceries, beverages, health & beauty, and more.

headline: Did Kroger’s (KR) Climate Disclosure Clash Reveal a Deeper ESG Strategy Trade-Off?
summary: On May 13, 2026, Friends Fiduciary disclosed that it had filed a shareholder proposal asking The Kroger Co. to publish an expanded report on how it plans to increase the scale and pace of its greenhouse gas emissions reductions, while Kroger urged investors to vote against the measure in its definitive proxy statement for the June 25, 2026 annual meeting. This clash between an investor pushing for faster climate action and Kroger’s board resisting additional reporting requirements highlights...

This clash between an investor pushing for faster climate action and Kroger’s board resisting additional reporting requirements highlights...

headline: Refrigerant leaks to cost Kroger $2.5M in fines, $100M for appliance upgrades
summary: The grocery chain has two years to upgrade 600 refrigeration units under a settlement with the U.S. Department of Justice and the Environmental Protection Agency.

raw.headline: Refrigerant leaks to cost Kroger $2.5M in fines, $100M for appliance upgrades
raw.summary: The grocery chain has two years to upgrade 600 refrigeration units under a settlement with the U.S. Department of Justice and the Environmental Protection Agency.

headline: Is Kroger (KR) Offering Opportunity After Recent Share Price Softness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Kroger's current share price reflects fair value or leaves some room on the table, you are not alone. Kroger's stock recently closed at US$66.24, with returns of 0.3% over the past week, a decline of 2.6% over the past month, 5.2% year to date, and 1.9% over the last year. The 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 42.9% and 101.4% respectively. These moves come against a backdrop of ongoing coverage of Kroger's scale in US food retail and investor focus on how it...
